title: noccaea torreana
intro: Noccaea torreana, also known as Torre's penny-cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Noccaea torreana include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as arthritis and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Noccaea torreana can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water, or by extracting its essential oils, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
